abilities.name: Demise
abilities.description: Falls unconscious = killed. On death, all within p2 suffer 2 damage + Fire effect.

abilities.name: Melee Expert
abilities.description: Generates 1 additional AP only for Close Combat.

actions: (1) Talon (Pugilism) | AV: 8R (16R) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. Ram Toss: Reduce to 0 damage, push 10 yards, Prone.
(3) Smash (Pugilism) | AV: 8R (16R) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 9/10/12 damage.
system.notes: Massive elemental Fire construct summoned by powerful sorcerers. Immune Burning. On death explodes with fire.
